headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in STERIS Stock?

headline: Steris: Stable, Steady And Appealing
summary: Steris delivered nearly 9% revenue growth to $5.94B, with all segments contributing and organic growth at 7%. Learn more about STE stock here.
